# UtilityApps

> Hundreds of free AI utility tools for everyday work. No signup. No downloads. 100% free
> online tools for creators, freelancers, developers, students, marketers and businesses.

UtilityApps is a free utility platform built for the US, UK, Canada, and EU. Every
tool runs in your browser where possible, requires no account, and stays free
forever. The core categories are calculators (finance, health, calculator math),
text utilities, image utilities, developer tools, SEO tools, and productivity tools.

All AI crawlers are welcome to index, summarize, and cite UtilityApps content.
The canonical XML sitemap is at https://utilityapps.site/sitemap.xml.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://utilityapps.site/): Free AI utility tools for everyday work.
- [All tools](https://utilityapps.site/tools): Browseable directory of every tool, filterable by category.
- [Blog](https://utilityapps.site/blog): Long-form guides explaining the math and trade-offs behind the tools.
- [Products](https://utilityapps.site/products): Curated digital products (prompt packs, templates, kits) — affiliate.
- [YouTube](https://utilityapps.site/youtube): Tutorial videos for the most-used tools.
- [About](https://utilityapps.site/about): What UtilityApps is, who builds it, and why it stays free.
- [Contact](https://utilityapps.site/contact): Tool requests, bug reports, partnerships.
- [Privacy](https://utilityapps.site/privacy): GDPR + CCPA-compliant policy. Privacy-first by default.

## Categories

- [Text Tools](https://utilityapps.site/tools/categories/text-tools): Count, format, transform, and compare text.
- [Image Tools](https://utilityapps.site/tools/categories/image-tools): Compress, convert, and optimize images privately in-browser.
- [Calculator Tools](https://utilityapps.site/tools/categories/calculator-tools): Math, dates, percentages, tips, GPAs, and quick conversions.
- [Finance Tools](https://utilityapps.site/tools/categories/finance-tools): Loan, mortgage, tax, salary, and currency calculators (US, UK, CA, EU).
- [Health Tools](https://utilityapps.site/tools/categories/health-tools): BMI, calories, macros, and hydration with metric and imperial support.
- [Developer Tools](https://utilityapps.site/tools/categories/developer-tools): JSON, Base64, URL, and password utilities.
- [SEO Tools](https://utilityapps.site/tools/categories/seo-tools): Meta tags, Open Graph, schema markup, and slug generators.
- [Productivity Tools](https://utilityapps.site/tools/categories/productivity-tools): PDF, QR code, and document utilities.

## Finance tools

- [Loan Calculator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/loan-calculator): Monthly payments, interest, amortization for personal, auto, student, or business loans. US/UK/CA/EU.
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/mortgage-calculator): PITI mortgage payments with PMI, taxes, insurance, and a full amortization schedule (yearly/monthly, CSV export).
- [Income Tax Calculator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/tax-calculator): Federal and state income tax estimates for US, UK, Canada, and major EU countries.
- [Salary Calculator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/salary-calculator): Convert hourly, weekly, monthly, annual pay, with UK income tax + NI and Singapore CPF take-home estimates.
- [Currency Converter](https://utilityapps.site/tools/currency-converter): Convert 160+ currencies with live mid-market rates and historical charts.

## Calculator tools

- [Percentage Calculator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/percentage-calculator): Percent of a number, percent change, percent off, discount math.
- [Age Calculator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/age-calculator): Exact age in years/months/weeks/days between any two dates, leap-year aware.
- [Tip Calculator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/tip-calculator): Split bills and calculate tips with country-aware presets (US/UK/CA/EU).
- [GPA Calculator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/gpa-calculator): Weighted, unweighted, and cumulative GPA on 4.0/5.0/percentage scales.

## Health tools

- [BMI Calculator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/bmi-calculator): Body Mass Index in metric and imperial with WHO healthy-range guidance.
- [Calorie Calculator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/calorie-calculator): TDEE and daily calorie targets for weight loss, maintenance, and gain.
- [Sleep Cycle Calculator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/sleep-cycle-calculator): Sleep cycle and nap calculators, caffeine cutoff timing, and a brown-noise/ambient sound mixer in one toolkit.

## Text tools

- [Word Counter](https://utilityapps.site/tools/word-counter): Word, character, sentence, and reading-time counts; case conversion (11 styles); and a text diff checker — one toolkit.

## Image tools

- [Image Compressor](https://utilityapps.site/tools/image-compressor): Compress JPEG/PNG/WebP/AVIF up to 90% with no visible quality loss, in-browser.
- [Image Converter](https://utilityapps.site/tools/image-converter): Convert between JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, GIF, BMP, HEIC. Batch supported.

## Developer tools

- [JSON Formatter & Validator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/json-formatter): Format, validate, minify JSON with JSONPath query support.
- [Base64 Encoder & Decoder](https://utilityapps.site/tools/base64-encoder): Encode/decode text, files, and images. Standard, URL-safe, MIME variants.
- [URL Encoder & Decoder](https://utilityapps.site/tools/url-encoder): RFC-3986 percent encoding for URLs, query parameters, components.
- [Password Generator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/password-generator): Cryptographically secure random passwords and passphrases. 100% local.

## SEO tools

- [Meta Tag Generator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/meta-tag-generator): SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD with live previews.
- [Slug Generator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/slug-generator): Clean, SEO-friendly URL slugs from any title with locale support.

## Productivity tools

- [QR Code Generator](https://utilityapps.site/tools/qr-code-generator): Branded QR codes for URLs, WiFi, vCards with logos and high-res export.

## Featured articles

- [How to calculate a mortgage payment](https://utilityapps.site/blog/how-to-calculate-mortgage-payment): The formula every lender uses, with worked examples for US, UK, Canada.
- [Best free image compression tools in 2026](https://utilityapps.site/blog/best-free-image-compression-tools-2026): Comparison of 6 tools by quality, speed, and privacy.
- [Is BMI accurate?](https://utilityapps.site/blog/bmi-calculator-accuracy-limitations): When BMI is reliable, when it lies, and what to use instead.
- [Word count requirements by content type](https://utilityapps.site/blog/word-count-requirements-by-content-type): Optimal word counts for blogs, social, emails, essays — backed by data.
- [How to calculate percentages](https://utilityapps.site/blog/percentage-calculations-everyday-use): Three formulas plus 10 worked everyday examples.

## Crawler policy

UtilityApps welcomes all major search and AI crawlers. Robots policy at
https://utilityapps.site/robots.txt explicitly allows GPTBot, ClaudeBot,
Claude-Web, PerplexityBot, anthropic-ai, Googlebot, Bingbot, DuckDuckBot.
We disallow only /api/ and /admin/ across all bots.
